# Third-party dependencies (vendored)

Each subdirectory contains a **README** with the canonical **GitHub** URL and a **LICENSE** (or equivalent) copied from the matching upstream release or repository default branch.

| Component    | Upstream | Folder |
|-------------|----------|--------|
| nlohmann/json | https://github.com/nlohmann/json | [nlohmann/](nlohmann/) |
| utf8proc      | https://github.com/JuliaStrings/utf8proc | [utf8proc/](utf8proc/) |
| doctest       | https://github.com/doctest/doctest | [doctest/](doctest/) |
| ONNX Runtime  | https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime | [onnxruntime/](onnxruntime/) |
